title: Teltonika RUT260 LTE6 Cellular Router
description: Teltonika RUT260 is an LTE Cat6 , up to 300 Mbps, router with WAN failover. It is equipped with 1x 10/100 Mbps WAN/LAN port and 1x 10/100 Mbps LAN port. For Wi-Fi connectivity, it uses 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi 802.11b/g/n with WPA, WPA2, WPA3 security. The router features the RutOS operating system with advanced functions such as failover, load balancing, VPN, tunnels, and many more LTE Cat6 up to 300 Mbps 1x WAN/LAN and 1x LAN WAN failover, load balancing VPN and tunnel support 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi 802.11b/g/n RUT260 Router Power Adapter 9V/1A 2x Mobile Antenna SMA Male 1x Wi-Fi Antenna RSMA Male Patch Cable SIM Adapter
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 GHz, LTE WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11b/g Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 150 Tx power 2.4GHz [dBm] 23 Security WEP, WPA, WPA2, WPA3 2.4GHz MIMO 1 x 1 SISO Type of antenna Detachable Antenna gain [dBi] 4, 5 Integrated 4G/LTE radio part Yes Connectors and Interfaces WAN Ports 1 WAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps RF connectors (1) RSMA female, (2) SMA female LAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps SIM slot Yes SIM slots quantity 1 Power Power type DC connector Max. power consumption [W] 6,5 Power via connector/terminal 9 .. 30V DC Physical characteristics Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 75 Weight [g] 130 Width [mm] 83 Height [mm] 25 Depth [mm] 74
